papers.title: Restoring Incentive Compatibility in Two-Stage Energy Markets with Prosumers
papers.titleZh: 恢复含产消者的两阶段能源市场中的激励相容性
papers.abstract: A central challenge in modern energy market design is the formulation of a strategy-proof imbalance settlement layer that secures both the economic efficiency of the institution and the stability of the power grid. Public data reveals that the day-ahead market is strategically biased below actual consumer demand. Such empirical observations are explained by active prosumers which provide implementable incentives for demand under-reporting. Active prosumers buy energy in the day-ahead market and sell energy in the real-time market for balancing real-time energy deviations. By under-reporting their demand for the day ahead they inflate real-time imbalances and, under uniform pricing, they dispatch their generation assets more profitably. We model the two-stage institution under linear preferences and benchmark it against its associated competitive equilibria. We show that although consumers' incentives for demand under-reporting vanish when the day-ahead market scales, prosumers' incentives remain lower bounded by a positive gain which depends only on the real-time market generation stack and their shares over it. To restore incentive compatibility under the existing informational constraints, we design a leave-one-out contrastive scoring rule-based penalty that is implemented by the day-ahead market operator, incentivizes prosumers to report their demand truthfully and ensures small charges when participating honestly. We illustrate these results with numerical simulations on synthetic data and evaluate our mechanism on real-market data by first rationalizing demand reports as subjective equilibria of the induced game. Our mechanism demonstrates strong incentive alignment while retaining a low cost for honest participation.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么现有能源市场会出现系统性需求低报？论文发现欧洲电力市场普遍存在日前市场申报需求低于实际消费的现象，且无法由预测误差解释。这源于产消者（prosumer）的跨市场套利动机：他们在日前市场少报需求，导致实时市场出现正向不平衡，从而通过调度自有发电资产获利。标准结算机制未能阻止此类行为，破坏了市场的效率与稳定性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者构建了一个两阶段能源市场模型，包含日前与实时两个耦合阶段。参与者包括纯消费者、产消者及发电商，各自拥有私有需求或成本类型。市场采用统一价格出清，产消者兼具用电与发电角色，并可通过跨市场交易获利。模型的关键在于将不平衡结算视为影响激励的核心环节，并引入主观信念下的贝叶斯博弈框架来刻画策略性报告行为。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明了两类参与者的激励差异：普通消费者的虚报收益随市场规模增长趋于零，但产消者的虚报收益被一个仅取决于实时供应曲线和其资产份额的正数下界所限制。因此，传统机制无法同时实现全体参与者的近似激励相容。为此，作者提出一种基于对比评分规则的惩罚机制，能够有效抑制产消者的策略性低报，同时保障诚实参与的成本可控。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者利用线性效用假设下的双拍卖模型刻画市场出清，并结合强凸函数生成的严格适当评分规则设计惩罚项。核心技术是构造‘留一法’对比评分机制，比较包含与排除某参与者报告时的市场预测能力差异，以此衡量其边际贡献并施加相应奖惩。该方法依赖于Lévy集中不等式和Kolmogorov-Rogozin不等式进行抗集中性分析，确保小规模操纵难以成功。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型依赖于线性偏好、统一定价和可观测总量等假设，可能限制其在复杂电价体系中的直接应用。机制的有效性也依赖于历史数据的质量与稳定性。尽管如此，论文的价值在于清晰揭示了跨市场所有权引发的结构性激励扭曲，并提出了信息轻量化的解决方案。最值得阅读的是其机制设计理念、对比评分的应用创新以及对真实市场数据的逆向推理实证方法。

papers.title: Strategyproof Facility Location and Committee Selection with Mixed Max and Sum Agent Types
papers.titleZh: 混合最大与求和型代理的策略证明设施选址与委员会选择
papers.abstract: We study strategic facility location, in which $n$ agents are located in an arbitrary metric space, and the goal is to choose $k$ facilities to minimize the total agent cost. The agents can have two types of individual cost functions: max-type where the agent wants to minimize the maximum distance from themselves to any chosen facility, or sum-type where the agent wants to minimize the average distance to the chosen facilities. The agents are self-interested, however, and both the agent location and the agent type may be private information. We provide deterministic strategyproof mechanisms for this setting, and prove bounds on their approximation ratio as compared with the solution minimizing the total agent cost. When agent types are private but their locations are known, we prove that an approximation of $\left(3 -\frac{2}{k}\right)$ is always possible, and a better approximation of $\left(\frac{2}{1-k+\sqrt{k^2-k+1}}-1\right)$ is achievable when we know the {\em fraction} of the agents with each type, but not necessarily the type of each individual agent. These bounds hold for arbitrary $k$ and arbitrary metric distances. When agent locations are private, we instead focus on the line metric, and show that a simple generalization of the median mechanism results in an approximation ratio of 3, even for large $k$ and arbitrary mixes of agent types. Our results show the importance of collecting information about agent types vs about their locations, and show that it is possible to produce good outcomes even without such information.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在设施选址中要考虑不同类型的代理？传统研究通常假设所有代理具有相同成本函数（如最小化到最近设施的距离），但现实中代理可能关注最远设施（最大型）或平均距离（求和型）。当这些类型是私有信息时，如何设计策略证明机制以防止误导报告，并仍能逼近最优社会成本，是一个尚未充分解决的问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者考虑一个度量空间中的n个代理，需选出k个设施。每个代理要么是最大型（希望最小化到最远设施的距离），要么是求和型（希望最小化到各设施的平均距离）。社会成本是所有代理个体成本之和。机制无法直接获知代理类型或位置，目标是设计策略证明机制，在不同类型信息私有时仍能提供良好近似比。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文给出了三种情形下的确定性策略证明机制及其近似比。当仅类型未知时，在任意度量空间下可实现(3−4/k+2r/k)-近似（r为最大型代理比例）；若完全不知类型，则为(3−4/k)-近似；当位置也未知时，在线性度量下通过推广中位数机制实现了恒定3-近似，显著优于一般度量下的Ω(n)下界。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者采用多种技术：利用三角不等式和观测关系比较不同解的成本；构造引理将最大型代理的成本与全体代理的平均距离关联；在线性情况下，通过构造一对一映射并‘分摊’右侧代理成本至左侧来完成充电论证。关键是处理混合类型间的交互，尤其是将最大型成本‘转移’到求和型时不损失过多因子。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 尽管结果具有一般性，但下界仅为1.186，与上界3之间仍有差距，尤其在类型未知情形。此外，机制依赖全局结构（如中位数），在分布式场景中实现可能受限。最值得读的是其对混合代理类型的建模方式、充电论证的技术创新，以及关于信息类型（位置vs类型）对机制性能影响的深刻洞察。

papers.title: Variable Bound Tightening for Nash Equilibrium Computation in Multiplayer Imperfect-Information Games
papers.titleZh: 多人不完美信息博弈中纳什均衡计算的变量边界紧致化
papers.abstract: There has been significant recent progress in algorithms for approximation of Nash equilibrium in large two-player zero-sum imperfect-information games and exact computation of Nash equilibrium in multiplayer strategic-form games. While counterfactual regret minimization and fictitious play are scalable to large games and have convergence guarantees in two-player zero-sum games, they do not guarantee convergence to Nash equilibrium in multiplayer games. Recently, an approach has been presented for exact computation of Nash equilibrium in multiplayer imperfect-information games that solves a quadratically constrained program based on a nonlinear complementarity problem formulation derived from the sequence-form game representation. This formulation was solved using Gurobi's nonconvex quadratic solver, which employs spatial branch-and-bound to iteratively refine variable bounds by solving convex relaxations of bilinear terms via McCormick envelopes. During presolve, Gurobi introduces auxiliary variables and, in some cases, binary variables, leading to an internal MIQCP reformulation. This approach was demonstrated to outperform prior algorithms from the Gambit software suite and quickly solve three-player Kuhn poker after removal of dominated actions; however, the algorithm was not able to solve the full version of the game within 24 hours. In this paper, we derive finite bounds on slack and multiplier variables in the nonlinear complementarity formulation. These bounds strengthen the convex relaxations used within spatial branch-and-bound and lead to substantial computational improvements. We demonstrate the impact of the proposed bounds on exact Nash equilibrium computation in three-player Kuhn poker.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为何现有算法难以精确求解多人不完美信息博弈中的纳什均衡？尽管双人零和博弈已有高效算法（如反事实遗憾最小化），但在三人及以上情形中，这些方法不再保证收敛到均衡。此前基于非线性互补问题（NLCP）的精确求解方法虽具潜力，却因变量无界导致空间分支定界效率低下，在完整版三玩家Kuhn扑克上无法24小时内求解。本文旨在填补这一计算空白。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者采用序列形式表示多人扩展式博弈，将纳什均衡求解转化为一个含二次约束的可行性问题。模型包含各玩家的行为序列变量、拉格朗日乘子与松弛变量，并通过KKT条件引入互补松弛约束。关键在于，原问题中松弛与乘子变量无界，导致求解困难。新模型通过引入有限边界重构变量域，从而改善凸松弛质量。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明了松弛变量和乘子变量存在自然的有限上界，这些界源自最优响应问题的强对偶性质。实验表明，仅对松弛变量施加边界即可将完整三玩家Kuhn扑克的求解时间从超24小时缩短至1.16秒，远超Gambit等现有工具。结果显示，紧致化边界显著提升求解效率，尤其当边界作用于出现在二次项中的变量时效果更佳。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者利用最优响应线性规划的对偶结构，结合终端收益范围推导出松弛变量的全局上界（Corollary 1），并通过信息集子树规模界定乘子变量范围（Proposition 2）。这些界被直接嵌入NLCP模型，增强Gurobi求解器在空间分支定界过程中对双线性项的McCormick包络逼近效果，从而加速收敛。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 虽然变量边界紧致化极大提升了求解效率，但其优势依赖于Gurobi内部MIQCP重构机制，且对乘子变量加界反而可能拖慢求解。此外，该方法仍局限于可建模为NLCP的小中规模博弈。最值得阅读的是其将经济学直觉（如机会成本）转化为算法加速手段的技术路径，为精确均衡求解提供了新思路。

papers.title: Envy-free Contracts with Subsidies
papers.abstract: We study algorithmic fair contract design, where a principal designs task-level contracts and fairly delegates a set of tasks to a set of agents. Prior work on this setting, particularly on envy-free (EF) contracts, either suffers from an unbounded price of fairness (PoF) or avoids this unboundedness by losing strict fairness. To address these limitations, we propose a novel scheme, called {\it Envy-free Contracts with Subsidies} (EFS), in which the principal may additionally offer agent-specific subsidies. We show that EFS contracts not only restore strict fairness, but can also outperform EF contracts by an arbitrarily large factor. Moreover, in sharp contrast to EF contracts, we prove that EFS contracts admit a tight $n^{Θ(n)}$ bound on the price of fairness, where $n$ is the number of agents. We further show that computing optimal EFS contracts is NP-hard in general. Nevertheless, when the number of tasks is constant, we provide a polynomial-time algorithm for computing optimal EFS contracts.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在任务委派中难以兼顾公平与效率？传统无嫉妒（EF）合同虽保障公平，却可能导致任意大的收入损失，即‘公平代价’无界。放松为近似公平（如EF1）虽改善收益，却牺牲了严格公平。本文提出新方案，在保持严格公平的同时控制公平代价，探索通过补贴协调激励与分配矛盾的可能性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型中一个委托人将异质任务分配给多个代理人，每个代理对不同任务的成功概率和成本各异。合同采用任务级线性分成，并新增个体化非负补贴。代理人必须愿意付出努力（激励相容），且任一代理不应嫉妒他人任务与补贴组合（EFS约束）。目标是在满足完全分配和无嫉妒的前提下最大化委托人期望收益。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 本文提出EFS合同，既能恢复严格无嫉妒，又可使委托人收益比标准EF合同高任意倍数。最关键的是，EFS的公平代价被紧界定为n的指数多项式量级O((n+1)^n)，彻底解决了EF合同公平代价无界的缺陷。此外，最优EFS计算是NP难的，但在任务数恒定时有多项式算法。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过构造性证明展示EFS的优势，并利用归约技术将EFS实例转化为EF问题，揭示两者联系。NP难性通过从3-Partition问题归约完成。对公平代价的紧界分析结合了单任务最优结构刻画与迭代逼近思想，关键在于设计特定参数化的指数型成功概率与成本分布来构造下界实例。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型依赖任务级线性合同与可观测结果不可观测努力的经典设定，补贴机制的实际可行性需考虑预算外生性。尽管如此，论文在理论层面清晰展示了补贴作为独立调节工具的价值。最值得读的是其机制设计理念、对公平代价的紧分析以及归约与构造技巧，特别是如何用补贴解耦激励与公平。

papers.title: Peak-Robust Voting Rules
papers.abstract: This paper proposes new robustness criteria for social choice correspondences under single-peaked preferences, inspired by the concepts of robustness in statistical estimation, where robust estimators are designed to be resilient to both model misspecification and outliers. Motivated by robustness to model assumptions, we introduce peak-robustness: a voting rule is peak-robust if it never selects an alternative that is a majority loser relative to some unchosen alternative for any preference profile sharing the same peak profile. To capture robustness to outliers, we propose tail-invariance, which requires that variations in the tails of the peak distribution do not affect the collective decision. Our main result shows that the median voting rule is the unique efficient rule satisfying these robustness criteria. When peak-robustness is weakened, we characterize the broader class of quantile rules. Taken together, these results provide a robustness-based axiomatic foundation for median and quantile voting rules, independent of the traditional strategy-proofness approach.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统社会选择理论多从策略免疫角度论证中位数投票规则的合理性，但本文关注的是信息不完全与极端意见下的决策稳健性。作者认为，投票规则不仅应抵御操纵，更应在偏好信息不完整或存在异常值时保持稳定。这引出了两个新问题：如何防止所选方案在某些合理偏好下成为多数输家？以及集体决策是否应忽略极端峰值的影响？
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定在单峰偏好环境下，选民在有序备选项上有唯一峰值，投票规则基于峰值分布做出选择。作者引入社会选择对应（SCC），允许输出一组结果，并定义了峰值配置相同但偏好延伸不同的‘一致’偏好轮廓。核心设定围绕三个特性展开：效率要求结果在最低与最高峰值之间，匿名性确保个体身份不影响结果，而投票规则被视为对群体代表性意见的统计估计。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文最主要的发现是，满足效率、峰稳健性和尾部不变性的投票规则必然是中位数投票规则。峰稳健性要求所选结果不能在任何一致偏好下输给未被选中的选项，而尾部不变性则要求去掉最极端的两个峰值不改变结果。此外，当峰稳健性弱化后，作者刻画出更广泛的分位数规则类，表明这些规则同样具备稳健性基础，从而为中位数与分位数规则提供了全新的公理化依据。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过将投票规则视为统计估计量，借鉴稳健统计思想构建公理体系。证明路径首先利用弱峰稳健性与引理连接到集合值孔多塞一致性与凸性，进而结合尾部不变性、端点不变性和峰值单调性逐步约束规则形式。关键技术在于将区间型社会选择对应还原为上下端点的单值函数，并借助经典中位数刻画定理反推参数结构，最终排除非边界固定参数的可能性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文假设奇数选民与线性有序备选项，限制了结果在偶数情形与高维空间的直接推广。虽然公理体系脱离了策略性假设，但其稳健性标准仍属最坏情况分析，未涉及概率建模。最值得阅读的是其将统计稳健性理念系统引入社会选择的视角转换，以及对分位数规则的全新刻画，为机制设计提供了不依赖策略免疫的替代性理论基础。

papers.title: Reliability-Asymmetric Spacecraft Autonomy: Co-Designing a Capable Learned GNC Stack with a Verified, Adaptation-Aware Runtime Shield
papers.titleZh: 可靠性不对称的航天器自主性：协同设计具备验证性、适应感知运行时防护的强大学习型GNC栈
papers.abstract: Deep-space missions need onboard autonomy that is both capable and certifiable. Rule-based autonomy is certifiable but brittle, while learned autonomy is capable but hard to verify. We present AMPLE-GNC, a three-tier guidance, navigation, and control stack. Its capability path combines a small foundation-model commander that maps natural language to PDDL+, a constraint-screening verifier, and a fault-adaptive controller. All three are bounded by a runtime shield with nine linear-temporal-logic invariants whose predictor soundness is machine-checked by the Kind 2 model checker. On a 6-DOF Basilisk testbed, we make three contributions. First, we deploy an edge commander. Fine-tuning a pretrained 360M model with grammar-constrained decoding gives a hard output-validity guarantee and 84% planner-executable actions. On a de-leaked test, novel-phrasing generalization is 38% exact and 51% action, rising to 48% exact after phrasing-diversity re-finetuning; we separate syntactic validity from semantic accuracy. Second, we introduce a fault-adaptive controller. Rapid Motor Adaptation infers latent actuator faults online and recovers 97.8% of actuator-sign faults and 94.4% of continuous-gain faults within the training randomization envelope. Fault-unaware PD and from-scratch end-to-end RL both score 0%, while the strongest classical-adaptive baseline reaches 55% on continuous gain. Beyond the envelope, a split-conformant retrain scores 57-67%, and adding 4x more in-regime data worsens performance, showing that randomization breadth, not data volume, drives generalization. Robustness is flat under star-tracker noise to 0.005. Third, we show that a latching safe-hold shield can suppress even a capable controller. A split-conformal recovery-deadline certificate with adaptation-aware engagement reconciles safety and recovery, keeping the controller 94.5% autonomous while still catching non-recovery.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 深空任务面临通信延迟和高风险双重压力，要求航天器具备无地面干预下的自主决策与容错能力，同时其行为必须可认证。传统基于规则的系统虽可验证但缺乏泛化性，而基于学习的系统虽能力强却难以确保安全。本文核心问题是：如何在飞行计算资源下，使学习型自主系统既具备应对未知故障和指令的能力，又不牺牲可认证的安全性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文构建了一个三层GNC（制导-导航-控制）系统，在6自由度Basilisk仿真平台上闭环运行。输入为自然语言指令，经小型语言模型转为PDDL+动作，由约束验证器筛选后交由故障自适应控制器执行，全程受形式化验证的运行时防护盾监控。评估采用去泄漏测试集、保持故障分类及严格的‘稳态保持’门限，强调真实泛化而非记忆化表现。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文实现了能力与安全性的共存：语言指挥官通过语法约束解码提供硬性输出有效性保证，并在新颖表述下达到48%语义准确率；故障自适应控制器在未知执行器增益与符号故障上恢复率达94%-98%，远超经典方法；最关键的是，提出适应感知的运行时保障机制，使防护盾能区分暂时越界与永久失效，从而在保障安全的同时维持94.5%以上的自主性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法核心是‘可靠性不对称’设计原则：将高能力但不可验证的组件（如语言模型、学习型控制器）置于低层，由可形式验证的高层组件（如语法、线性时序逻辑防护盾）进行边界约束。特别地，采用分裂保形预测为控制器恢复时间生成分布无关的截止证书，使防护盾仅在确认无法恢复时才介入，解决了传统防护对自适应瞬态过程误判的问题。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结论受限于特定故障类型（如加性偏置和完全失效无法处理）、训练分布内泛化假设及合成命令数据集规模。尽管如此，论文提供了从问题定义、诚实评测到系统集成的完整可信证据链。最值得阅读的是其系统级设计思想、适应感知保障机制及端到端可复现的实证方法，为高风险场景下学习型自主系统的部署树立了新标准。

papers.title: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
papers.titleZh: 上下文内世界建模用于机器人控制
papers.abstract: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often fail to generalize to novel setups, such as altered camera viewpoints or robot morphologies, because they are typically conditioned only on current observations and language instructions. By ignoring the underlying system configuration as a variable, these models implicitly assume a fixed execution context encountered during training, necessitating data-intensive fine-tuning for any new environment. In this work, we introduce In-Context World Modeling (ICWM), a framework that treats system identification as an in-context adaptation problem. ICWM enables robot policies to autonomously infer essential system variables from a short history of self-generated, task-agnostic interactions. Unlike traditional In-Context Learning that uses demonstrations to specify what task to perform, ICWM leverages the context window to understand how the system operates. By processing these interactions before task execution, the model implicitly captures the world dynamics of the current system, enabling adaptation to novel configurations without parameter updates. Extensive experiments in simulation and on real-world robot platforms demonstrate that ICWM significantly outperforms standard VLA baselines on novel camera viewpoints.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现代视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在面对新环境（如不同相机视角或机械臂形态）时泛化能力差，因其仅依赖当前观测和指令，隐含假设系统配置固定。这导致部署时需大量微调。本文指出问题本质是测试时缺乏对系统配置（如视角、动力学）的显式识别，现有方法无法自主校准，限制了通用机器人系统的实用性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究机器人在未知视觉-物理配置下执行操作任务的能力。输入为图像、语言指令及自生成的探索片段，输出为动作序列。训练时模型接触多视角数据并学习从交互历史中提取系统动态；推理时先进行无任务导向的随机探索，将产生的观察-动作片段作为上下文前缀，引导策略适应当前设置。评估基于仿真（LIBERO）和真实机器人平台上的跨视角泛化性能。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出In-Context World Modeling（ICWM），首次将上下文窗口用于系统辨识而非行为示范，使机器人能通过自我探索隐式建模环境动态。实验显示其在未见视角下显著优于标准VLA基线，尤其在长视野任务中提升达26%以上，并进一步验证其对语义干扰和机械形态变化的鲁棒性，证明无需参数更新即可实现强适应性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: ICWM的核心是在推理前插入一个主动探测阶段：机器人执行若干次随机动作并记录视觉-动作转换序列，作为上下文前置输入。模型利用Transformer的序列建模能力，从前缀中隐式推断出当前系统的感知-运动映射关系。训练时通过混合多配置数据促使模型学会利用该上下文进行条件调整，从而在测试时实现零样本适配，关键在于将世界建模转化为上下文内的隐式推理过程。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 尽管ICWM表现优异，但其有效性依赖于探测动作的质量与多样性，某些极端遮挡视角仍具挑战。此外，真实实验中探测开销虽可摊销但仍存在。读者应重点关注其问题重构思路——将系统辨识转为上下文学习——以及简洁有效的训练-推理协议设计，这对开发无需微调的通用机器人策略具有重要启发价值。

papers.title: Learning Action Priors for Cross-embodiment Robot Manipulation
papers.titleZh: 为跨具身机器人操作学习动作先验
papers.abstract: Most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models build on a Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone by attaching an action module and optimizing the full policy jointly. This design inherits strong visual and linguistic priors from the VLM, but leaves the action module to learn physical motion almost from scratch. As a result, the policy lacks an explicit motion prior, forcing early optimization to simultaneously discover temporal action dynamics and cross-modal alignment, a challenge further amplified in cross-embodiment settings. In this work, we propose to pretrain the action module with motion priors before cross-modal VLA alignment. Specifically, we introduce a two-stage training framework that equips the action module with cross-embodiment temporal motion structure before VLA training begins. In Stage~1, a lightweight flow-matching-based encoder-decoder action module efficiently learns temporal motion structure solely from unconditioned action trajectories, without processing visual or language tokens. In Stage~2, this learned prior is transferred to VLA training through decoder reuse and early-stage latent distillation, aligning visual-language features with the action embedding space while still allowing end-to-end policy refinement. In addition, the trained encoder serves as a compact history compressor, summarizing state-action histories into a single temporal context token for history-aware modeling at negligible cost. Extensive experiments across 13 diverse cross-embodiment tasks on both simulated and real-world platforms validate the effectiveness of our approach. Compared with VLA training without action priors, our model achieves faster convergence, higher success rates, and substantially stronger performance on data-scarce real-world tasks. Moreover, scaling up the action data in Stage~1 yields a more generalizable action prior that directly improves downstream VLA performance.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型依赖于视觉和语言先验，但动作模块通常从零开始学习物理运动，导致训练初期需同时掌握动作动态与跨模态对齐，尤其在具身形态各异的跨平台任务中更为困难。这种不平衡限制了策略的稳定性与收敛速度，本文旨在解决动作先验缺失带来的优化瓶颈。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究在涵盖13项任务的跨具身设定下进行，包括仿真环境LIBERO、RoboCasa及真实Franka机械臂。模型输入为视觉观测与语言指令，输出为动作片段。通过两阶段训练：第一阶段仅用无条件动作轨迹预训练动作模块，第二阶段将其融入VLA进行端到端微调，并采用成功率为主要评估指标。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出两阶段训练框架，在动作模块中预先注入跨具身时间运动结构。实验表明，该方法显著加快收敛、提升成功率，尤其在数据稀缺的真实世界长尾任务上表现突出。更大的动作数据量还能进一步增强先验泛化能力，验证了动作先验的有效性与可扩展性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法采用基于流匹配的编码器-解码器结构，在第一阶段仅利用动作序列学习紧凑的动作嵌入。第二阶段通过解码器重用、早期潜在蒸馏和历史压缩，将先验迁移到VLA中。编码器还将历史状态-动作序列压缩为单一时序上下文标记，以极低成本实现历史感知决策。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 尽管性能提升明显，但方法仍依赖特定的统一动作空间设计与额外预训练阶段，可能增加部署复杂性。实验集中在特定任务集，泛化至更广形态或动态环境尚待验证。读者应重点关注其问题洞察——动作先验的必要性，以及轻量级预训练如何有效解耦动作与跨模态学习过程。

papers.title: RoboAtlas: Contextual Active SLAM
papers.abstract: We present RoboAtlas, a contextual Active SLAM framework that adaptively balances geometric exploration and semantic reasoning using a scalable 3D semantic mapping system, OpenRoboVox. RoboAtlas integrates frontier exploration, global semantic-map reasoning, and egocentric VLM-based reasoning through a contextual multi-armed bandit that transitions from exploration to semantically guided navigation as scene understanding improves. We evaluate the system in simulation and on a Unitree Go2 robot in large-scale real-world environments exceeding 1800 m2 with approx. 30k mapped semantic instances, achieving a 100% task success rate. On the GOAT-Bench "Val Unseen" benchmark, RoboAtlas achieves state-of-the-art performance with highest reported success rate (SR) of 90.6%, using GPT-4o, improving over the strongest prior baseline by 17.8 percentage points in SR. Using the much smaller Qwen2.5-VL-7B model, it still achieves 88.8% SR, outperforming all baselines using GPT-4o in SR, and revealing the importance of the information gained by our semantic mapping framework over simply replacing the underlying foundation model. The results demonstrate that grounding foundation models with large-scale 3D semantic maps enables robust and efficient contextual Active SLAM.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有主动SLAM系统多依赖几何探索，难以应对需语义推理的复杂任务。当环境未知时，纯前沿探索效率低；而一旦地图初步建立，又应转向基于语义的目标搜索。传统方法采用固定策略，无法动态适应探索阶段的变化。本文旨在解决如何让机器人在探索过程中自适应地平衡地图构建与语义导航的问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 系统接收语言指令，在未知环境中自主导航并完成目标搜索。输入为实时RGB-D数据与语言指令，输出为导航目标点。通过OpenRoboVox构建带语义的3D地图，并由上下文多臂老虎机（CMAB）在三个专家间动态选择：前沿探索、全局语义地图推理与第一人称视觉语言模型推理。在仿真与真实机器人上测试任务成功率。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出RoboAtlas框架，首次实现从纯探索到语义引导的平滑过渡。在真实世界超1800平方米环境中实现100%任务成功率，在GOAT-Bench‘Val Unseen’上达到90.6%的成功率，超越最强基线17.8个百分点。即使使用更小模型Qwen2.5-VL-7B也优于多数GPT-4o基线，表明其优势源于系统设计而非仅靠大模型。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心是上下文多臂老虎机（CMAB），根据当前地图覆盖率、语义相似度等状态动态选择最优导航策略。早期偏好前沿探索以快速扩展地图，后期转向语义专家进行精准搜索。OpenRoboVox实现实时语义建图，通过分块传输、异步处理与2D柱状图压缩，保障资源受限平台上的运行效率。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 性能依赖语义建图质量，漏检或误匹配会影响决策；远程调用大模型带来延迟，限制无网络场景部署；奖励函数手工设计，权重影响探索与利用的平衡。最值得阅读的是其系统级设计思路——如何将几何探索、语义推理与大模型能力有机融合，并通过轻量机制实现动态调度，这对具身智能系统的工程实现具有启发意义。

papers.title: G2DP: Diffusion Planning with Spatio-Temporal Grid Guidance
papers.titleZh: G2DP: 基于时空网格引导的扩散规划
papers.abstract: In autonomous driving, diffusion-based planners have emerged as a promising paradigm for robust motion planning in dense and interactive traffic, as they can effectively model diverse driving behaviors. However, their inherent stochasticity often requires explicit guidance during denoising to ensure safety and route adherence for robust closed-loop execution. Existing guidance typically relies on sparse, entity-centric geometric queries or post-hoc refinement, yielding limited situational awareness and fragile performance in interactive scenes. To address this issue, we propose G2DP (Grid-Guided Diffusion Planning), a diffusion-based planner that directly enforces dense environmental constraints through inference-time guidance. Specifically, G2DP constructs a differentiable spatio-temporal cost volume by fusing probabilistic future occupancy distributions with a route-progress map. By formulating this volume as a continuous safety energy functional, it injects dense gradients directly into the denoising loop, actively steering trajectory generation toward collision-free and progress-optimal regions. Extensive closed-loop evaluations show that G2DP achieves state-of-the-art performance on nuPlan, outperforming the strongest imitation-learning baseline by +7.2 points in reactive score. It further maintains top scores in zero-shot transfers to interPlan and DeepScenario benchmarks, with collision avoidance improving by +10.15 over the unguided approach on interPlan. These results demonstrate that spatio-temporal cost grids serve as an effective representation for robust guidance in diffusion-based planning.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 在自动驾驶密集交互场景中，扩散模型虽能生成多样轨迹，但其随机性导致缺乏显式安全约束，难以保障闭环保留下的路径安全与路线一致性。现有方法依赖稀疏几何查询或事后修正，前者感知不全面，后者破坏生成分布，均难实现主动、平滑的安全引导。本文旨在解决如何在不依赖后处理的前提下，在扩散过程中注入密集、可微的安全信号。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究在闭环仿真中进行条件轨迹生成的任务，输入为自车及周围动态历史与静态地图，输出为未来3秒的自车轨迹。模型由扩散轨迹生成器与独立的占用网格预测网络组成，推理时通过查询时空成本体积计算能量梯度并注入去噪过程。评估基于nuPlan、interPlan和DeepScenario三大基准，采用反应性得分、碰撞规避等指标衡量安全与规划能力。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出G2DP，首次将稠密时空概率占据栅格作为可微成本场直接融入扩散去噪循环，实现主动安全引导。在nuPlan上超越最强模仿学习基线7.2分，零样本迁移到interPlan和DeepScenario仍保持领先，尤其在碰撞规避上提升超10点。结果表明稠密分布式引导显著优于稀疏几何或后处理方法，改变了对生成式规划中安全约束实现方式的理解。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法核心是构建一个融合未来占据概率与路线进展图的时空成本体积，并定义基于车辆轮廓Top-K代价聚合的能量函数。其解析梯度在去噪后期注入采样更新，形成连续引导信号。该机制无需修改主干网络，即可在保持生成多样性的同时，使轨迹向低风险、高进展区域偏移，解决了稀疏引导带来的突兀行为与后处理导致的分布偏移问题。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 依赖预训练占用模型与固定引导调度，未端到端联合优化，且引导时机与权重需手动调参。实验虽覆盖多个挑战性基准，但未测试极端长尾场景下的失效模式。最值得阅读的是其方法设计——如何将感知输出转化为可微引导场，这对生成式规划与安全对齐具有普适启发意义。
